title: Looking for Financial Analyst at Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Looking for Financial Analyst at Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Financial Analyst at our Mumbai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited:
Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited!
